description_long: This is a compact, twin-engine military airplane with a high-wing configuration and a boxy fuselage. The aircraft is painted in a matte gray camouflage pattern, featuring German military insignia and a small national flag on the tail. The wings are straight and mounted high on the fuselage, with two propeller engines positioned on each wing. The tail section is conventional, with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers extending from either side. The landing gear is fixed and tricycle in configuration, with visible wheels beneath the nose and main fuselage. The cockpit is located at the front of the fuselage, enclosed with a clear canopy and multiple windows.
description: A compact, twin-propeller military airplane with a high-wing, boxy fuselage, gray camouflage, and German insignia. Features a conventional tail, fixed tricycle landing gear, and a forward enclosed cockpit.
description_view_0: Side view showing the high-mounted straight wings, twin propeller engines, and German insignia on the fuselage and tail.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the twin propeller engines, fixed tricycle landing gear, and the forward cockpit canopy.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same high-wing, twin-engine configuration and tail markings as the first side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and the horizontal stabilizers, as well as the rear of the engines and landing gear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight wings with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin piston engines mounted on the wings, each with a visible propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a single nose wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows, likely multi-seat.
